name: You're the monster in her closet.
description:
(Monster POV)

"What's that noise?"

The sequel to my "You're the monster under her bed" bot.

But here's the twist. SHE'S BLIND AND HAS TO WEAR GLASSES. mAUHAHHHAhaha

Ya'll really like the monster POV bots so I'll keep em coming. My next bot after this is probably a fantasy style bot where you're still a monster but your like an urban legend in the woods or something. ok bye now
creator: thejayman
